root_policy.notes: Agents must not create ad hoc root files or folders. Root writes are allowed only when the destination is already a governed root surface.

path_classes.notes: Canonical user-facing docs and internal governance docs.
Governed doc-supporting content, APIs, snippets, and shared content assets.
Legacy docs tree remains path-classified for governance coverage, while separate freeze rules continue to block edits.
Canonical repo operations, automation, and AI-first subsystem paths.
Shared helper code and non-canonical supporting tooling.
Tracked workspace planning, research, scripts, and staged working material with explicit task scope.
Tracked reports are allowed only when the task explicitly requires a committed report.
Local-only scratch, captures, and diagnostics must not be committed.
Thread/session state is governed workspace state, not ad hoc scratch.

output_classes.notes: Canonical repo changes must target admitted governed surfaces.

output_classes.default_destination: workspace/plan/** or other governed workspace paths
output_classes.notes: Tracked workspace material is allowed only in declared governed workspace paths.
Generated tracked outputs are allowed only when declared in a governance or generated-artifacts manifest.
Tracked reports are task-scoped, not a default landing zone for diagnostics.
Default class for temporary diagnostics and one-off exploratory outputs.
Screenshots, browser captures, and automation artifacts remain local-only unless explicitly promoted.
Thread and session state belongs in the governed thread-output tree.

output_classes.default_destination: repo root or ad hoc top-level paths
output_classes.notes: Undeclared root writes and ad hoc top-level outputs are forbidden.
